sentences.arabic: بُنِيَتْ مَدِينَةٌ قَدِيمَةٌ عَلَى ضَفَّةِ النَّهْرِ.
sentences.translation: Drevni grad je izgrađen na obali rijeke.
sentences.translationEn: An ancient city was built on the bank of the river.

sentences.translation: Ljudi su u njoj živjeli kroz mnoge generacije.
sentences.translationEn: People lived in it for many generations.

sentences.translation: Grad je bio velik i lijep.
sentences.translationEn: The city was large and beautiful.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ السُّوقُ فِي وَسَطِ الْمَدِينَةِ مَشْهُورًا.
sentences.translation: Tržnica u centru grada bila je čuvena.
sentences.translationEn: The market in the centre of the city was famous.
